overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist exploring a bioluminescent tribal village at night. The character traverses bamboo walkways, elevated wooden bridges, and waterfront paths surrounded by glowing teal flora and intricate wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with cooking areas

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate around cooking fire

agents.ego_description: walking through bamboo walkways of a tribal village, passing stone cooking fires and thatched huts

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden structure, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: woven bamboo plank flooring forming the main village path
traditional hut with straw roof and wooden frame
large black cauldron over fire pit surrounded by stones
glowing teal plants emitting soft light
thick carved wooden posts supporting overhead structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered tribal village at night, with the character walking on bamboo walkways past cooking fires and thatched huts. Bioluminescent plants provide teal lighting as the character navigates through the settlement, passing a standing villager in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway through dense foliage

events.description: transitions from ground village to elevated wooden walkway with rope railings
passing under brighter bioluminescent lanterns illuminating the path

agents.ego_description: walking up elevated wooden planks surrounded by giant tropical leaves and bioluminescent flora

entered.detail: raised wooden path with gaps between planks elevated above ground
massive tropical leaves with bioluminescent veins towering over the path
thick twisted rope barriers along walkway edges
elaborately carved tribal building with multiple levels
dark mountain range visible against night sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto elevated wooden walkways surrounded by dense bioluminescent vegetation and giant tropical leaves. Rope railings line the path as the character approaches an intricately carved wooden structure, with mountains visible in the distant background.

events.description: enters covered wooden archway descending toward water level
water becomes visible as character emerges from covered structure

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs through a covered archway toward the waterfront, passing sitting villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden dock edge, looking out at water

entered.detail: tunnel-like structure made of woven branches and wood
calm dark water reflecting green bioluminescent lights
extended wooden platform over water's edge
suspension bridge spanning across the water

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a covered wooden archway into a waterfront area, transitioning from elevated walkways to dock platforms. Water becomes visible as the character emerges from the covered structure, approaching villagers sitting by the water's edge near a rope bridge.

events.description: character stops and turns around to look back at the village structures

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade, observing villagers and water features, then turning to survey the area

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden bench, fishing or relaxing by water
villager standing guard near wooden stairs

entered.detail: wide wooden boardwalk along water's edge with space for gathering
woven nets draped over wooden posts drying
steep staircase leading up to higher village levels

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character exploring a waterfront promenade where villagers sit and relax by the water. The character walks past fishing nets and wooden stairs, then turns to survey the bioluminescent village structures and water reflections, with other villagers visible sitting and standing in the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bioluminescent tribal village at night, transitioning from sheltered residential walkways to an open waterfront promenade. It begins on bamboo paths amidst cooking fires and thatched huts, where teal glowing flora illuminates the character's passage past a distant villager. As the character ascends onto elevated wooden walkways, the environment shifts toward dense tropical vegetation and giant leaves, leading toward an intricately carved structure with mountains looming in the background. The scene then descends through a covered wooden archway, moving from the heights of the canopy down to dock platforms where the first glimpses of water appear. Finally, the camera emerges onto a waterfront promenade, passing fishing nets and wooden stairs to survey the reflections of the glowing village architecture in the water as villagers relax along the shore.
